failedAssertions.reason: Test session_persistence: 15/26 tests passed. Session save works but load is broken - JSON parser in session_persistence.c uses strstr() which finds nested 'id' fields inside workspace objects instead of top-level fields like 'active_workspace_id', causing workspace name, cwd, git_branch to not be loaded (all empty strings after load). Rerun confirms same 15/26 failure.
